title: Harbor Container Port: The Secured-Zone Cordon
strategies: single-stack cordon: fence only the most profitable stack (max v - 4*lam); reproduces the evaluator's weak anchor and scores ~0.1

single-seed region growing: start from the best stack and greedily annex the frontier cell that most increases profit (v - lam*(4-2*shared_edges)) until no addition helps; never restarts or backtracks

best-of-N seeded restarts + add/remove local search: grow from many top-value seeds, then sweep the frontier adding profit-positive cells and peel interior cells whose removal helps while keeping the zone connected, keeping the best cordon across restarts
region metaheuristics: simulated-annealing / perturb-and-reoptimize over the connected region, or exact submodular-cut relaxations, to escape the greedy basin and squeeze the loose perimeter penalty
